name: MitoQ vascular function trial in healthy older adults
summary: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial of 20 mg/day MitoQ for 6 weeks in healthy older adults with impaired endothelial function.
population: Healthy older adults aged 60 to 79 years with impaired endothelial function

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for NAD and Redox Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, function, and safety in Healthy older adults aged 60 to 79 years with impaired endothelial function. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
